reference: Hello, I really appreciate your concern. It may not be related to the spine, but it seems to be a muscular spasm. However, it may not be normal. Right now, it can be managed with chlorzoxazone and diclofenac once a day. If a degenerative spinal disease needs to be ruled out, then an MRI is an option. I hope this information helps.
text: Hello, I really appreciate your concern. It may not be related to the spine, but it seems to be a muscular spasm. However, it may not be normal. It can be managed with chlorozoxazone and diclofenac once a day. If a degenerative spinal disease needs to be ruled out, then an MRI is an option. I hope this information helps.
